comment: 33yo woman, mantle field radiotherapy for Hodgkin lymphoma at age 18 (15y ago). Cured of lymphoma; no current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = COG-LTFU protocol (annual breast MRI from 25 / 8y post-RT; alternating mammogram from 30; LDCT eligibility; thyroid US; secondary leukemia CBC); alternative = general USPSTF cadence.
